title: Struct result changes based on version

features.name: struct_logic_member_array_indexed_conditional
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with a logic member, an unpacked array of that struct, and an indexed access to the struct member used in an if condition

features.name: struct_member_read_after_nonblocking_assignment
features.description: Code should include a struct member read in a conditional that also triggers a nonblocking assignment to a different struct array element in the same cycle

features.name: struct_member_display_after_conditional_check
features.description: Code should include displaying a struct member value immediately after using that same struct member in a preceding conditional
